lastmod: 2026-05-17

# Report.Farm

> Farm and supply-chain intelligence for growers, agribusiness, and the buyers who source from them. Report.Farm turns satellite pixels into early crop-stress alerts, sourcing-region risk intelligence, and scheduled farm reports — watching land, crops, water, weather, and machinery without putting a single sensor in the field.

Report.Farm is an autonomous farm operating layer for growers, cooperatives, food & beverage buyers, commodity traders, and agricultural lenders and insurers. The platform ingests Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 optical imagery (with optional Landsat thermal and commercial optical feeds from Planet and Maxar), applies physics-grounded AI models to spectral / thermal / NDVI / SAR-coherence signatures, and surfaces actionable field signals — crop stress, yield anomalies, drought and flood exposure, irrigation change, land use shifts — to operators on a real-time farm-portfolio map. It explains what changed, estimates the financial impact, and ships scheduled reports plus urgent alerts.

Canonical host: https://report.farm/

## Core capabilities (6 solution lines)

- **Crop & Yield Monitoring** — Detect crop stress and yield anomalies weeks before they show in the field. Multi-spectral anomaly fusion (Sentinel-2 NDVI + soil moisture + thermal IR + Sentinel-1 SAR coherence) tuned per crop and growth stage. Confidence-scored, severity-ranked, geolocated to the field.
- **Supply-Chain & Sourcing-Region Intelligence** — Monitor a portfolio of suppliers, farms, and sourcing regions from orbit. Buyers get early warning when drought, flood, or yield shortfall threatens a sourcing region, before it hits contracted supply. Change detection against historical baselines with evidence-grade exports.
- **Land, Water & Weather Risk** — Continuous monitoring of fields, irrigation, and watersheds for drought stress, flood exposure, soil-moisture change, land subsidence, and encroachment. Weather-coupled risk scoring trended over time.
- **Physical AI** — Edge inference, on-device processing, sensor fusion, and hardware-partner integration for UAV, tractor, and field-robot platforms. Closes the gap between satellite detection and on-ground action.
- **Systems Integration** — REST and webhook APIs, farm-management-system bridges, ERP and procurement connectors, GIS export (Esri, MapInfo, QGIS), and event-bus connectivity.
- **Reports, Alerts & 24/7 Monitoring** — Scheduled farm and portfolio reports, always-on alerting with on-call rotation, tiered SLAs, role-based dashboards (sales, ops, project management, analytics, customer portal, tenant admin) and full audit-event lineage.

## Who it serves

- Growers and farm operators (row crop, orchard, specialty)
- Agribusiness and cooperatives
- Food & beverage buyers and CPG procurement teams (portfolio-of-suppliers monitoring)
- Commodity traders
- Agricultural lenders (collateral and covenant monitoring)
- Crop insurers (underwriting and loss assessment)

## Technology stack

- **Data:** Sentinel-1 SAR (C-band, 5–10m resolution, 6–12 day revisit), Sentinel-2 optical, Landsat 8/9 thermal IR, commercial optical (Planet, Maxar) for sub-meter tasking
- **Processing:** PostGIS, MinIO blob storage, Python preprocessing workers, MapLibre + Cesium client rendering
- **AI:** PyTorch-based detector + extractor pipelines, per-signal explainability, model versioning, A/B routing
- **Multi-tenant SaaS:** Per-tenant data isolation enforced at schema, JWT auth with RBAC, full audit log, RBAC smoke matrix in CI
- **Customer GIS upload:** Customers overlay their own field boundaries, crop plans, parcel maps, and topology data (GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML/KMZ, GeoTIFF, PDF, PNG, JPG)

## Pricing

- **Starter** $1,800/month — single tenant, 1 growing region, weekly Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 scenes, 25 GB GIS storage, business-hours support
- **Growth** $5,400/month — multi-tenant (5), 5 growing regions, daily satellite scenes, 250 GB GIS storage, 24/7 alerting, named success engineer (featured)
- **Enterprise** Custom — multi-region, commercial optical overlay (Planet / Maxar), 99.9% SLA, dedicated success engineer, sovereign-cloud and on-prem options

## Compliance

SOC 2 Type II — targeted for production go-live; not yet audited. GDPR-compliant for EU customer data residency on Enterprise tier.

## Brand and naming

The product name is "Report.Farm". The platform's command surface is sometimes referred to as "Report.Farm Command".
